excluded_pools.gc_background: superseded for training by the 15,708 real mined genomic windows; a 0th-order i.i.d. surrogate built at P0 when no genome panel existed. Retained unchanged as the ADR-0005 D7 GATE-1 benchmark denominator.
excluded_pools.leader_decoy: label collision: all 8 records are T-box-derived and 2 are exact substrings of training-corpus positives. Re-sourcing deferred to P2-10b′ (ADR-0005 A7 re-scopes D14's leader-pool retention clause).
